name: Venue Lost Item Recovery Kit
description: Organize fast, safe outreach to cafes, gyms, taxis, hotels, and venues after a lost item, with contact tracking and ownership verification templates.
author: Bell (design)
target_user: People who left an item at a venue, hotel, taxi, rideshare, event, or other public place and need a calm recovery plan.
trigger_keywords: I left something at a cafe
I forgot my bag in a taxi
Message a venue about lost property
How do I recover my lost item
use_cases: Planning safe ownership verification and pickup
